    metadata: Metadata {
        title: None,
        subtitles: [],
        artists: [],
        composers: [],
        lyricists: [],
        album: None,
        year: None,
        key: None,
        tempo: None,
        time: None,
        capo: None,
        custom: [],
    },
    lines: [
        Directive(
            Directive {
                name: "define",
                value: Some(
                    "Asus4 base-fret 1 frets x 0 2 2 3 0",
                ),
                kind: Define,
            },
        ),
        Directive(
            Directive {
                name: "chord",
                value: Some(
                    "Asus4",
                ),
                kind: ChordDirective,
            },
        ),
    ],
}
